title_en: Sora 2 moves video world models closer to deployment
title_zh: Sora 2 让视频世界模型更接近产品部署
description_en: OpenAI launches Sora 2 with stronger physical realism, synchronized audio, and a clearer product rollout path.
description_zh: OpenAI 推出 Sora 2，强调更强物理真实感、同步音频，以及更清晰的产品化落地路径。
why_it_matters: It shows that world-model-like video systems are becoming product surfaces rather than only research demos.
